project.title: Raw IQ Is No Longer Enough
project.style_notes: premium cinematic tech explainer, dark graphite environments, cool white and electric amber highlights, sleek motion-graphics energy, subtle particles, clean silhouettes, high contrast without readable UI text, visually expensive and modern
project.format_guidance: Compose for premium 9:16 vertical framing. Keep the main subject large in the center third, preserve a raised lower subtitle-safe band, and avoid critical detail at the very top and bottom edges.
project.narration_style: urgent, sharp, broad-audience English explainer with confident pacing
project.narration_notes: Every line must be understood on first listen. Favor provocative phrasing over jargon, but keep the claims defensible and concise for short-form delivery.
project.consistency_notes: Do not depict recognizable real people or logos. Use generic engineers, abstract AI agents, symbolic dashboards without readable text, and visual metaphors for leverage, speed, and competition. Keep the main engineer's silhouette, wardrobe, and proportions stable across shots.
constraints: no readable on-screen text inside generated visuals
no logos, no brand marks, no watermark
avoid uncanny or photoreal close human faces
keep motion clean, cinematic, and premium
preserve the raised lower subtitle-safe band
project.audio_notes: Minimal low synth pulse, restrained cinematic whooshes, subtle impacts, and airy ambience under external narration only.

characters.name: Lead Engineer
characters.description: a generic high-performing engineer in dark minimal clothing, clean silhouette, confident posture, and no recognizable celebrity likeness
continuity_rules: keep the same dark minimal wardrobe across shots
preserve a clean centered silhouette and confident posture
avoid recognizable real-person likeness or brand-specific styling

shots.title: The old advantage breaks
shots.subject: the lead engineer alone in a dark futuristic design studio
shots.action: studies complex floating systems alone as the room subtly dims and the feeling of certainty starts collapsing
shots.setting: dark graphite design studio with abstract architecture, suspended geometric forms, and premium atmospheric depth
shots.lighting: cool rim light with faint electric amber accents and controlled contrast
shots.camera_motion: slow push-in with a slight downward tilt as the room feels smaller
shots.start_frame: one brilliant engineer stands alone in a large premium studio, surrounded by abstract technical forms that imply intelligence and mastery
shots.end_frame: the room closes in visually and the engineer suddenly feels isolated and vulnerable
shots.narration_line: The smartest engineer in the room may no longer win.
shots.narration_cue: land no longer win as the room visually tightens around the subject
shots.sfx_notes: low cinematic hum, faint tonal drop, subtle whoosh as the frame tightens

shots.title: AI leverage flips the race
shots.subject: two generic engineers, one alone and one amplified by AI assistance
shots.action: the AI-augmented engineer rapidly multiplies outputs and overtakes the lone expert in a clean symbolic race
shots.setting: sleek abstract competition space with layered workstations, progress shapes, and premium motion-graphics depth
shots.lighting: cool white on the lone side, brighter amber-white energetic glow on the AI-assisted side
shots.camera_motion: start centered, then drift toward the AI-assisted side as it surges ahead
shots.start_frame: two engineers begin at similar starting points in a polished abstract work arena
shots.end_frame: the AI-assisted engineer clearly surges ahead while the lone expert falls behind
shots.narration_line: A mediocre engineer with AI can now outperform a genius without it.
shots.narration_cue: hit outperform as the AI-assisted side pulls decisively ahead
shots.sfx_notes: tight rhythmic pulses, layered whooshes, subtle acceleration sound on the winning side
must_keep: clear visual contrast between solo work and AI leverage
strong central composition readable on mobile
negative_constraints: no clutter in the lower center

shots.title: One engineer becomes a command center
shots.subject: the lead engineer orchestrating a rapidly multiplying swarm of AI agents
shots.action: translucent AI assistants branch outward to handle design, code, testing, planning, and simulation tasks in parallel
shots.setting: vertical command chamber made of holographic layers, luminous nodes, and flowing task pathways without readable text
shots.lighting: electric amber and cool white volumetric light with premium depth
shots.camera_motion: slow orbit around the engineer as the swarm expands into a towering halo
shots.start_frame: one engineer stands in the center of a quiet futuristic control space
shots.end_frame: the engineer is surrounded by a massive elegant swarm of AI helpers filling the frame vertically
shots.narration_line: The next engineer may work with a hundred AI agents.
shots.narration_cue: land hundred AI agents at the fullest expansion of the swarm
shots.sfx_notes: layered synth bloom, branching holographic pings, smooth energy rise

shots.title: The benchmark gets brutal
shots.subject: a highly paid engineer represented by premium symbolic salary and AI-usage meters
shots.action: a compensation meter glows large while the AI usage stream stays too small, triggering a sharp visual alarm and imbalance
shots.setting: dark luxury data visualization chamber with elegant bars, flowing token particles, and no readable labels
shots.lighting: electric amber warning highlights against dark graphite and cool white accents
shots.camera_motion: slow descending move as the empty AI-usage stream becomes obvious and the warning intensifies
shots.start_frame: a towering compensation bar and a much smaller AI-usage stream sit in tense imbalance
shots.end_frame: the mismatch triggers a dramatic red-amber alarm effect around the engineer symbol
shots.narration_line: One AI leader's benchmark was brutal: a five-hundred-thousand-dollar engineer should spend half that on AI tokens.
shots.narration_cue: land brutal as the warning glow spreads through the frame
shots.sfx_notes: controlled warning pulse, deep impact, flowing particle hiss
must_keep: strong imbalance between salary and AI-use metaphors
negative_constraints: no readable numbers or labels inside the image

shots.title: Who you are really competing against
shots.subject: a field of generic engineers in a symbolic race, with one AI-augmented engineer pulling ahead
shots.action: the AI-augmented engineer breaks away from the pack toward a bright finish line while the others fade slightly behind
shots.setting: clean futuristic sprint corridor with layered depth, luminous horizon, and premium motion design
shots.lighting: high-energy amber-white finish glow with cool shadowed background depth
shots.camera_motion: fast but smooth forward chase ending on the AI-augmented leader
shots.start_frame: multiple engineers run in a premium symbolic corridor with one augmented figure beginning to pull ahead
shots.end_frame: the AI-augmented leader dominates the frame near the bright horizon while the others trail behind
shots.narration_line: Your real competition uses AI better than you.
shots.narration_cue: land better than you on the strongest lead frame
shots.sfx_notes: tight chase whoosh, low impact hit, bright finish swell
